title: Installing Approved Software from the Software Catalog
text:
Q: How do I install approved software from the software catalog?
A: To install approved software from the software catalog, follow these steps: Step 1: Open the 'Company Software Catalog' application on your computer. Step 2: Log in using your company credentials (username: your_email@company.com, password: your network password). Step 3: Once logged in, browse or search for the software you need using the search bar or categories. Step 4: Click on the software title to view its details and ensure it meets your requirements. Step 5: Click the 'Install' button located on the software details page. Step 6: Follow any on-screen prompts to complete the installation process. Step 7: Once the installation is complete, you may need to restart your computer for the changes to take effect. Step 8: If you encounter any issues during installation, please contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
